text: In this clean, bright hallway, I feel an anticipatory quiet, as if I'm on the edge of discovery. Through the glass, the vibrant space marked "R+D" invites curiosity, but also feels a bit sterile—an environment of observation more than participation. Entering, the collage of text, screens, and abstract patterns immerses me in a hum of thoughts. The words on the wall seem to mirror my experience: a heightened awareness, a tension between being watched and hidden, between inquiry and defense. I feel a subtle unease, mingled with excitement—the weight and promise of new knowledge.
